chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail. Appl. No.2138 of 2024 Date Order with signature of the Judge 29.11.2024 Mr. Sajjad Ali Bhutto, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Abrar Ali Khichi Addl. P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant is seeking pre arrest bail in Crime No.427/2024 U/s 354, 452, 337-A(i), 34 PPC of P.s. Liaqatabad, Karachi. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to him vide order dated 20.09.2024 and today matter is fixed for confirmation or otherwise. 2. As per brief facts, complainant who is a tenant of house No.9, third floor, Liaqatabad, Karachi had a quarrel with landlord, whose son alongwith applicant, Papoo and two unknown persons entered the house of complainant, abused her, tore off her clothes and Papoo caused a club blow on her hand. As a result of which, she sustained an injury opined by the Doctor as Ghyre-e-Jaifa Hashmya punishable upto 5 years. 3. It is argued at bar that co-accused Papoo who has been assigned role has been granted bail by the trial court which has refused bail to the applicant by considering him as Papoo, whereas in challan it is clarified that Asif is aka Papoo. In the circumstances, learned Addl. P.G. submits that any order may be passed as the main accused has already been granted bail. 4. In the above circumstances, I find applicant entitled to bail. Accordingly, this application is allowed and the ad-interim pre arrest bail granted to the applicants is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of.
The Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. J U D G E A.K
